comment:
Замена: \(5^x=t\)
$$t-\frac{600}{t-1}\geq 0\\ \frac{t^2-t-600}{t-1}\geq 0\\ \frac{(t-25)(t+24)}{t-1}\geq 0$$
$$\displaystyle \left[ \begin{array}{l l} t\geq -24\\ \begin{cases} t< 1\\ t\geq 25 \end{cases} \end{array} \right. \Rightarrow \left[ \begin{array}{l l} \begin{cases} 5^{x} \geq -24\\ 5^{x} < 5^{0} \end{cases}\\ 5^{x} \geq 5^{2} \end{array} \right.$$
Т. к. \(5^x>0\), то:
$$\displaystyle \left[ \begin{array}{l l} x< 0\\ x\geq 2 \end{array} \right.$$
Ответ: \(x\in (-\infty;0)\cup [2;+\infty)\).
